titleStmt.title: SII 17.548: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 548. (A.R. No. 505 of 1904.) AGATTIYĀṈPAḶḶI, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south base of the central shrine in Agastyēśvara temple.
The details of date given, viz., 2nd year, Kumbha, Monday, śu. 2, Śadaiyam, correspond to 1218 A.D., January 20, Monday, f.d.t., ·13; ·40.

This records the gift of 1,500 aṉṟāḍu-naṟkāśu entrusted into the hands of the śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple of god Tiruvagattiyāṉpaḷḷi-uḍaiyār in Kuṉṟūr-nāḍu in Umbaḷa-nāḍu, for a perpetual lamp, by Tiruppaḻaṉam-uḍaiyār alias Virāṭakularāyar Pākkai Kuḍapulamuḍaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ Ādittadēvaṉ Āditta••••ḻvār of Koṟṟamaṅgalam in Puṟaṅkarambai-nāḍu in Rajēndraśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ śrī rājarājatevaṟku yāṇṭu Iraṇṭāvatu kumpa nāyaṟṟup pūrva pakkṣa tutikaiyum tiṅkaḷ kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa cataiyattu nāḷ rājentiracoḻavaḷanāṭṭup puṟaṅkarampai nāṭṭuk koṟṟamaṅkalamuṭaiya yaṉ tiruppaḻaṉamuṭaiyārāṉa virāṭakularāyar pākkai
kuṭapulamuṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ Ātittatevaṉ Ātitta ḻavaṟkku Umpaḷa nāṭṭukkuṉṟūr nāṭṭut tiruvakattiyāṉpaḷḷi Uṭaiyār koyil muppatu vaṭṭattuk kāṇiyuṭaiya civappirāmmaṇarom tirunontāviḷakku Upaiyaṅkoṇṭa paricāvatu Ivvāṭṭai māci mātattu Ittirunantāviḷakku Oṉṟukkum Upaiyamākap policai
cekuttut tiruviḷakku Erikkakkaṭavomāka nāṅkaḷ kaikkoṇṭa Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu 1000 5 100 Ikkācu Āyirattu Ainnūṟum kaikkoṇṭu tirunontā viḷakku Oṉṟum cantirātittai varai Erikka kaṭavomāka Upaiyaṅkoṇṭom Ikkoyil muppatuvaṭṭat
tu kāṇi Uṭaiya civappirāmmaṇarom .
Digital edition of SII 17.548 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
